message:
fix(wizard): use try_from for Duration u128→u64 cast, refresh snapshots

Replace `as u64` with `u64::try_from().unwrap_or(u64::MAX)` for
Duration::as_millis() in wizard transcript recording. Refresh
date-sensitive history snapshots.

Closes bd-391w.
